title: arctostaphylos alpina var. japonica
intro: Arctostaphylos alpina var. japonica, also known as Japanese bearberry, is a type of evergreen shrub that belongs to the family Ericaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Japanese bearberry include its potential to help manage urinary tract infections, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Japanese bearberry can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
